The '''Squall Mark IV''' was a [[Seaskimmer (watercraft)|seaskimmer]] model manufactured by [[Jerritech]] and used on [[Jerrilek]] as a means of private transportation and for leisure. Its main hull was reminiscent of a [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]], and it had two jet engines attached to it.<ref name="AJ4" />

At low speed, the engined were raised and the hull of the vahicle was in contact with the water. At high speed, the jet engines were lowered into the water and the body of the skimmer raised upwards, giving the vehicle a more catamaran-like configuration. Like most seaskimmers, the Squall came unarmed, but sportsmen would occasionally mount a harpoon cannon.<ref name="AJ4" />

[[Preela Dorat]] owned a seaskimmer, which a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] used in the [[Mission to Graleca|skirmish at Graleca]].<ref name="AJ4" />
